report_type: Saved Posts + Group Activity — Berks County small business and women entrepreneur

saved_posts.author: Berks County Community Foundation
saved_posts.post_summary: Announced that the Women in Arts Microgrant 2026 received 142 applications, decisions to be communicated by mid-December.
saved_posts.relevance: Amanda's sf-opp-002 application is in this pool.

saved_posts.author: Reading Beautification Coalition
saved_posts.post_summary: Announced a new Storefront Activation Grant cycle opening March 1, 2027 with a clarification that mixed-use ground-floor commercial in West Reading is now in-scope.
saved_posts.relevance: Confirms 624 Penn Avenue eligibility for sf-opp-003.

saved_posts.author: PA Women's Business Center
saved_posts.post_summary: Hosting a virtual application workshop for the Aspire Grant on November 5, 2026 at 12:00 ET. Registration via the PA WBC site.
saved_posts.relevance: Useful prep for sf-opp-001. Workshop date is two weeks before the Nov 30 deadline.

saved_posts.author: Greater Reading Chamber Alliance
saved_posts.post_summary: Tip sheet on writing executive summaries for small-business grant applications.

saved_posts.author: Eileen Fisher (corporate)
saved_posts.post_summary: Recap of the 2026 Women-Owned Business Grant winners. Three Pennsylvania businesses in the top 25.

groups_followed: Wyomissing and West Reading Business Owners

draft_posts.subject: Announcing the Fall Showcase at Santander Performing Arts Pavilion
draft_posts.body_preview: Five years of teaching, four standing classes, one stage. November 14 at Santander Performing Arts Pavilion. Doors at 6:30 PM. Tickets on sale shortly. More to come.
draft_posts.memo: Held for the Oct 20 conversation. Do not publish without explicit go-ahead.
